upcoming.title: 痴迷
upcoming.summary: 在折断神秘的“心愿柳”以赢得暗恋对象的心之后，一个对爱情充满幻想的人如愿以偿地得到了自己想要的一切，但很快他发现，有些欲望需要付出黑暗而可怕的代价。
upcoming.summaryEn: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinis

upcoming.title: 福尔摩斯小姐3
upcoming.summary: 侦探伊诺拉·福尔摩斯前往马耳他探险，并打算在那里结婚，但夏洛克的失踪令其卷入一桩危险的案件。
upcoming.summaryEn: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

upcoming.title: 穿普拉达的女王2
upcoming.summary: 随着传统出版业的式微，时尚女王米兰达在职业生涯中迎来新挑战。她不得不与手握广告预算的曾经的助理，如今已是奢侈品牌集团高管的艾米莉正面交锋。两人在行业变局中展开了一场关乎权力与生存的较量。
upcoming.summaryEn: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand th

upcoming.title: 玩具总动员5
upcoming.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
upcoming.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new

upcoming.title: 超级少女
upcoming.summary: 当一位冷酷无情、突如其来的劲敌突袭家园，“超级少女”卡拉·佐-艾尔不得不与一位意想不到的同伴结盟，横跨星际，踏上一段交织复仇与正义的壮阔征途。
upcoming.summaryEn: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and j

upcoming.title: 绵羊侦探团
upcoming.summary: 影片改编自莱奥妮·斯万的畅销小说。牧羊人乔治最爱给羊群读侦探小说，没想到自己有一天会离奇死亡。他留下的3000万巨额遗产，让每个人貌似都有犯罪动机。警察毫无头绪之时，羊群们决定“不务正业”迈出牧场，追查牧羊人“躺平”真相！它们秉承着遇见麻烦就吃草，嗅到危险就躺倒的哲学，却迎来了一个意想不到的结果……
upcoming.summaryEn: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep rea

upcoming.title: 小黄人与大怪兽
upcoming.summary: 为了拍摄心中理想的怪兽电影，这群萌趣活宝四处物色演员，竟然真的集齐了各式怪兽，上演疯狂大乱斗！
upcoming.summaryEn: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to t

upcoming.title: 后室
upcoming.summary: 一位心理治疗师的病人，在一次诡异的事故中“切入”到了一个超越现实的奇异维度。为了带回病人，这位治疗师不得不亲自踏入那片无边无际、充满黄色壁纸和嗡嗡荧光灯响声的未知迷宫。
upcoming.summaryEn: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

upcoming.title: 海洋奇缘：启航
upcoming.summary: 海的召唤，从未停止。熟悉的旋律响起，属于“莫阿娜”的冒险，再次扬帆启航。
upcoming.summaryEn: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

upcoming.title: 奥德赛
upcoming.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
upcoming.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,

upcoming.title: 公民义警
upcoming.summary: 男主角桑德斯是一名义警，他追捕罪犯、伸张正义，成为社交媒体红人和公众眼中的英雄，但当地警察局长认为他是社会的威胁，打算将他打倒。
upcoming.summaryEn: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.

upcoming.title: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
upcoming.summary: 重建普通生活后，彼得一边在大学完成学业、一边从事兼职以维持生计，同时仍肩负着守护纽约街头的蜘蛛侠责任。然而，当一个神秘力量从内部腐蚀这座城市的安全与秩序，彼得被迫再次披上战衣。他必须在强大的敌人与昔日纽带之间找到平衡，并重新定义英雄的意义。
upcoming.summaryEn: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to

upcoming.title: 挽救计划
upcoming.summary: 太阳正在被“吃”掉，绝望吞噬地球。一名“平凡”的中学教师背负全人类的希望，踏上“太空不归路”。末路孤旅中，他意外遇到一位外星萌友，一个同样身陷绝境的外星工程师，这对“宇宙搭子”成了两个文明最后的救命稻草。他们能否在资源紧缺的情况下攻克重重科学谜 题，寻回唯一的希望火种？
upcoming.summaryEn: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the rid

upcoming.title: 罗宾汉之死
upcoming.summary: 罗宾汉一生沉沦于罪恶和杀戮，饱受过往阴影的折磨。一场他以为是绝唱的战斗后，他身负重伤。一位神秘女子给了他救赎的希望。
upcoming.summaryEn: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chan

upcoming.title: 人生大弟震
upcoming.summary: 古怪的“弟弟”再次意外出现后，这个著名房地产经纪人精心打造的生活被彻底颠覆。
upcoming.summaryEn: A tightly wound realtor's picture-perfect life gets an extreme makeover when his lovably chaotic "little brother" suddenly reappears.

upcoming.title: 鬼玩人6：燃烧
upcoming.summaryEn: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into deadites, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life - survive even in death.

upcoming.title: 金谍行动
upcoming.summary: 当一名冷酷无情的独裁者窃取了数十亿美元的巨额财富后，一支潜伏于暗影之中的精英特工小队受命夺回这笔巨款。这些特工游走于全球暗网，既能操控权谋博弈，亦精通爆破突袭。这场本已险象环生的惊天盗局却风云突变，最终升级为一场充斥着谋略、欺诈与生死较量的全面战争。
upcoming.summaryEn: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of

upcoming.title: 调音师
upcoming.summary: 一位才华横溢的钢琴调音师，发现自己精湛的钢琴调音技艺可以用于破解保险箱，由此他的生活发生了翻天覆地的变化。
upcoming.summaryEn: A gifted piano tuner's meticulous skills for tuning pianos lead him to discover an unexpected aptitude for cracking safes, turning his life upside down.

upcoming.title: 揭秘日
upcoming.summary: 如果有人告诉你，我们并非宇宙中唯一的智慧生命，并且向你展示、证明了这一点，你会感到恐惧吗？今年夏天，真相将属于七十亿人。我们正一步步接近……揭秘日。
upcoming.summaryEn: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces

upcoming.title: 熊乡
upcoming.summary: 克罗将饰演年迈却令人生畏的俱乐部老板曼科・卡帕克，他遭到一名蒙面持枪歹徒抢劫。如今，他原本打算卖掉俱乐部，与女友一同安享晚年的愿望，似乎变得比以往更加遥不可及。贩毒集团的头目们对他步步紧逼，而一个初出茅庐的年轻人在镇上崭露头角，急切地想要买下这家俱乐部。
upcoming.summaryEn: A nightclub owner is on the verge of leaving his dangerous past behind for retirement with his girlfriend. When masked gunmen rob him and he finds himself squeezed by ruthless cartels, a mysterious ne
